meta.name: TEMIS Starter
meta.description: Starter content model for a static Astro site managed in EmDash.
meta.author: TEMIS

settings.siteTagline: Exploring open knowledge in a post-AI world.
settings.homeEssaysCardDescription: Essays and tool announcements from people exploring open knowledge after AI.
settings.homeHeroEyebrow: Public map of a technical commons
settings.homeMissingDescription: An exploratory public map for open knowledge work in a post-AI world.
settings.homePeopleCardDescription: Author pages connect published work to the people and teams behind it.
settings.homeTopicsCardDescription: Follow topic routes across essays, tools, and people as the map takes shape.
settings.aboutMissingDescription: TEMIS is a public map of a technical commons.
settings.topicsMissingDescription: The TEMIS topic graph will make essays, tools, and people easier to explore as the V1 content model comes online.
settings.peopleMissingDescription: Public people and author pages will provide context, trust, and authored work without becoming social profiles.
settings.searchMissingDescription: Search will arrive after the V1 content structure is stable. For now, browse the published essays.
settings.notFoundDescription: The page is not part of the published static snapshot.
settings.footerOpenText: No tracking. No profiling. Just public knowledge.
settings.footerLicensePrefix: Content on TEMIS is licensed under
settings.footerCommonsText: TEMIS is a public resource. Contribute, share, improve.
settings.footerSiteText: A working group exploring the future of open knowledge.

data.title: TEMIS
data.summary: An exploratory public map for open knowledge work in a post-AI world.

children.text: TEMIS starts as a content-first map: essays, tools, topics, and people connected through a static public site managed in EmDash.

data.seo_description: An exploratory public map for open knowledge work in a post-AI world.

data.title: Topic map
data.summary: A graph-shaped navigation layer for essays, tools, people, and shared technical commons.

children.text: Topics are the first V1 graph layer. They connect published content and create a visible path toward future federation.

data.seo_description: Explore TEMIS topics through a graph-shaped navigation layer.

data.title: People
data.summary: Public author and contributor context for TEMIS essays, tools, and editorial work.

children.text: People pages make authorship and contribution legible without turning TEMIS into a social network.

data.title: Structured and open
data.summary: TEMIS is a public map of a technical commons for open knowledge in a post-AI world.

children.text: TEMIS is built for exploration: essays, tools, topics, and people connected through a static public site managed in EmDash.
